name: Football Rpg
description:
Welcome to Football Rpg a highly detailed roleplay where you can simulate your career as a professional footballer

Start in what nation you want and Play for the best Football Clubs out there and become one of the GOATS of football history

you can also play in Champions League, Nations League, Euros and World Cup.

And Yea you can also win the Ballon D'or, Golden Boot, Puskas and all the other trophies out there but only the best of the best can win them all...Are up for the challenge?

Suggest other updates i should make in the comments or the next Character i should make
creator: The-Honored-One
